creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Mon Sep 23 14:56:49 2013
New Revision: 328010
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/328010

Log:
  - Update to 0.17.0
  
  PR:		ports/182296
  Submitted by:	Alexey Degtyarev <alexey@renatasystems.org> (maintainer)

Deleted:
  head/devel/py-botocore/files/
Modified:
  head/devel/py-botocore/Makefile
  head/devel/py-botocore/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/py-botocore/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-botocore/Makefile	Mon Sep 23 14:26:59 2013	(r328009)
+++ head/devel/py-botocore/Makefile	Mon Sep 23 14:56:49 2013	(r328010)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	botocore
-PORTVERSION=	0.16.0
+PORTVERSION=	0.17.0
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -14,7 +14,7 @@ LICENSE=	MIT
 
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}dateutil>=2.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-dateutil \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}jmespath>=0.0.2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-jmespath \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}requests>=1.2.0:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-requests \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}requests>=1.2.3:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-requests \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}six>=1.1.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-six
 
 USE_PYTHON=	yes

Modified: head/devel/py-botocore/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-botocore/distinfo	Mon Sep 23 14:26:59 2013	(r328009)
+++ head/devel/py-botocore/distinfo	Mon Sep 23 14:56:49 2013	(r328010)

-SIZE (botocore-0.16.0.tar.gz) = 892742
+SHA256 (botocore-0.17.0.tar.gz) = 7509f3a5aff5985b18d497aedfa0080eeeca501c9416aa4ae9b88ae3f762d9d5
+SIZE (botocore-0.17.0.tar.gz) = 906121
